diagnosis: The level is an extremely long horizontal corridor with almost no vertical variation — the player spawns at ground level and the exit sits at the same elevation hundreds of tiles away. The only structure is a single flat floor with occasional enemy markers (1, 2, 3) placed on that same plane, so the entire playthrough reduces to holding right and occasionally jumping over or shooting enemies. The playtester fell once at x≈1273 (roughly one-third of the level width) after 107 seconds, took three hits, killed three enemies, and quit without reaching the exit, rating the experience 1/5 and explicitly calling out the lack of vertical and horizontal path variety.
